subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This is a servant from whose vision Thou hast removed the veil, for whom Thou hast filled the chalice of bounty, and before whom Thou hast unveiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد قد ازلت عن بصره الغشاء و ملئت له کاس العطاء و کشفت عن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @review of publications, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
